title: WunderGraph Cosmo Schema Contract
description: A Schema Contract provides a filtered version of a composed federated graph to different consumers based on tag exclusions.

namespace.description: The namespace the contract belongs to.

routingUrl.description: The routing URL for the contract graph.

excludeTags.description: Tags excluded from the contract schema.

compositionStatus.description: The current composition status of the contract.

updatedAt.description: When the contract was last updated.
